name: Grazing Shot
entries: When you miss with a ranged attack roll using a weapon, you can expend one {@classFeature Risk|Gunslinger|ValdaGunslinger|2|ValdaGunslinger|Risk Die} (no action required) to deal damage to that creature equal to a roll of the die plus your Dexterity modifier (minimum of 1). This damage is the same type dealt by the weapon, and the damage can be increased only by increasing the ability modifier. You can only use this maneuver once per turn.
